mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COLLECT_LOG ( COLLECT_LOG_ID, SERVER_ID, SERVER_IP, SOURCE_FILE_PATH, LOG_TYPE, LOG_ID, LOG_TIMESTAMP, LOG_CONTENT, LOG_VALUE, RAW_LOG, COLLECT_DATE, COLLECT_DATETIME, SCHEDULE_TYPE, LINE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{collectLogId}, #{serverId}, #{serverIp}, #{sourceFilePath}, #{logType}, #{logId}, #{logTimestamp}, #{logContent}, #{logValue}, #{rawLog}, #{collectDate}, #{collectDatetime}, #{scheduleType}, #{lineNumber}, #{createdAt} )
